message:
feat(conformance): add ext4 external xattr block fixture

Adds conformance fixture for ext4 external xattr blocks, improving
ext4 structure coverage from 90.9% to 97.0%.

- Add ext4_xattr_block.json fixture with user.mime and security.selinux
- Add validate_xattr_block_fixture() helper to ffs-harness
- Add conformance test verifying xattr names and values
- Update COVERAGE.md reflecting xattr block coverage gains
- Update checksums.sha256 with new fixture hash

Remaining ext4 gaps: MMP block (2 MUST clauses).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,12 +15,12 @@
 | Ext4ExtentHeader | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | via leaf + index fixtures |
 | Ext4ExtentIndex | ✅ | ✅ | 3 | 3 | 100% | via index fixture |
 | Ext4Xattr (ibody) | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | via inline_data_with_continuation |
-| Ext4Xattr (block) | ❌ | ❌ | 4 | 0 | 0% | **MISSING** - external xattr blocks |
+| Ext4Xattr (block) | ✅ | ✅ | 4 | 4 | 100% | user + security attrs |
 | Ext4DxRoot | ✅ | ✅ | 3 | 3 | 100% | htree DX root with 3 entries |
 | Ext4DxEntry | ✅ | ✅ | 2 | 2 | 100% | via dx_root fixture |
 | Ext4MmpBlock | ❌ | ❌ | 2 | 0 | 0% | **MISSING** - multi-mount protection |
 
-**ext4 Total: 66 MUST clauses, 60 passing = 90.9%**
+**ext4 Total: 66 MUST clauses, 64 passing = 97.0%**
 
 ## btrfs On-Disk Structures
 
@@ -43,13 +43,11 @@
 
 ## Priority Gaps
 
-1. **ext4 External Xattr Blocks** - Extended attributes > 60 bytes
-2. **ext4 MMP Block** - Multi-mount protection
-3. **btrfs DevItem** - Multi-device support
+1. **ext4 MMP Block** - Multi-mount protection (2 MUST clauses)
+2. **btrfs DevItem** - Multi-device support (4 MUST clauses)
 
 ## Next Actions
 
-- [ ] Add ext4_xattr_block.json fixture
 - [ ] Add ext4_mmp_block.json fixture
 - [ ] Add btrfs_devitem.json fixture

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+{
+  "description": "ext4 external xattr block (4096 bytes) with user.mime and security.selinux attrs",
+  "size": 4096,
+  "writes": [
+    {"offset":   0, "hex": "000002ea", "_comment": "magic = 0xEA020000 little-endian"},
+    {"offset":   4, "hex": "01000000", "_comment": "refcount = 1"},
+    {"offset":   8, "hex": "01000000", "_comment": "blocks = 1"},
+    {"offset":  12, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "hash = 0"},
+    {"offset":  16, "hex": "00000000000000000000000000000000", "_comment": "reserved (16 bytes)"},
+
+    {"offset":  32, "hex": "04", "_comment": "entry[0]: name_len = 4 ('mime')"},
+    {"offset":  33, "hex": "01", "_comment": "entry[0]: name_index = 1 (EXT4_XATTR_INDEX_USER)"},
+    {"offset":  34, "hex": "f00f", "_comment": "entry[0]: value_offs = 4080 (near end of block)"},
+    {"offset":  36, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "entry[0]: value_block = 0 (unused)"},
+    {"offset":  40, "hex": "0a000000", "_comment": "entry[0]: value_size = 10 ('text/plain')"},
+    {"offset":  44, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "entry[0]: hash = 0"},
+    {"offset":  48, "hex": "6d696d65", "_comment": "entry[0]: name = 'mime'"},
+
+    {"offset":  52, "hex": "07", "_comment": "entry[1]: name_len = 7 ('selinux')"},
+    {"offset":  53, "hex": "06", "_comment": "entry[1]: name_index = 6 (EXT4_XATTR_INDEX_SECURITY)"},
+    {"offset":  54, "hex": "d00f", "_comment": "entry[1]: value_offs = 4048"},
+    {"offset":  56, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "entry[1]: value_block = 0"},
+    {"offset":  60, "hex": "20000000", "_comment": "entry[1]: value_size = 32 ('system_u:object_r:user_home_t:s0')"},
+    {"offset":  64, "hex": "00000000", "_comment": "entry[1]: hash = 0"},
+    {"offset":  68, "hex": "73656c696e7578", "_comment": "entry[1]: name = 'selinux'"},
+
+    {"offset":  76, "hex": "0000", "_comment": "terminator: name_len=0, name_index=0"},
+
+    {"offset": 4048, "hex": "73797374656d5f753a6f626a6563745f723a757365725f686f6d655f743a7330", "_comment": "entry[1] value = 'system_u:object_r:user_home_t:s0' (32 bytes)"},
+    {"offset": 4080, "hex": "746578742f706c61696e", "_comment": "entry[0] value = 'text/plain' (10 bytes)"}
+  ]
+}
